Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to an email account from a new address or mobile device. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.ip} logged in to an email account from device {datafield8} on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.ip} logged in to an email account from device {datafield8} on host {event_src.host}. The device is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {external_src.ip} logged in to an email account on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
